sentence_reviews.text: Modern gated recurrent architectures scale matrix or exponential memory and linear-time recurrence toward foundation-model regimes.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Beck et al. xLSTM paper for exponential gating, matrix memory, and scaling language-model regimes; LSTM and Deep Learning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core mechanism is supported, but the wording adds broad foundation-model/instruction-following implications beyond one direct source.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of xLSTM & linear-recurrent hybrids is to connect LSTMs & GRUs, Gating & multiplicative control to downstream capabilities including Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Beck et al. xLSTM paper for exponential gating, matrix memory, and scaling language-model regimes; LSTM and Deep Learning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependency portion is supported, but the downstream capability list is graph-derived and not fully established by the cited packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include LSTMs & GRUs, Gating & multiplicative control.
